objectives: Add builder pattern code generation to the mx20022 codegen pipeline
Generate BuilderError common type in mx20022-model
Wire emit_builder into emit/mod.rs for all StructDef types
Pass all quality gates: check, clippy -D warnings, test, fmt
constraints: Do not break existing roundtrip tests
Generated code must pass clippy -D warnings
Builder field types must exactly match the struct field types (ChoiceWrapper<T> for xs:choice)
important_facts: The codegen uses proc_macro2/quote for token generation, prettyplease for formatting
xs:choice fields are wrapped in ChoiceWrapper<T> — builders must replicate this
Structs with no required fields emit a simpler build() body (no let mut missing) to avoid unused_mut lint
Default derive works on builder structs because Option<T> and Vec<T> both impl Default
The insta snapshot test needed updating after builder code was added
cargo-insta is not installed; update snapshots by cp .snap.new to .snap
decisions_made: Use #[derive(Default)] on builder structs instead of manual impl — cleaner and avoids default_field_inits generation
Add #[must_use] to all setter methods to satisfy clippy::missing_must_use on Self-returning methods
Add #[allow(clippy::struct_field_names)] on builder structs — ISO 20022 field names share prefixes by design
Emit build() body conditionally based on has_required — avoids unused_mut lint for all-optional structs
Put integration tests in mx20022-model/tests/builder_test.rs and roundtrip tests in mx20022-parse/tests/roundtrip.rs (not mx20022-model, which has no parse dependency)

iteration.summary: Implemented the full builder pattern code generation pipeline. Created BuilderError in common/builder.rs with Display and Error impls. Created emit/builders.rs with emit_builder() generating builder struct, Default derive, #[must_use] setters with chaining, and a validated build() method. Wired emit_builder into emit/mod.rs so every StructDef emits both its struct and its builder. Fixed several clippy issues in generated code (unused_mut, struct_field_names, must_use, match_same_arms). Regenerated all 13 ISO 20022 schemas. Added 10 unit tests in builders.rs, 7 integration tests in model/tests/builder_test.rs, and 2 roundtrip tests in parse/tests/roundtrip.rs. All quality gates pass with zero failures.
outputs_produced: Builder roundtrip tests appended to crates/mx20022-parse/tests/roundtrip.rs
next_actions: Item #9: extend business rule validation (BIC, IBAN, date range checks)
Run cargo deny to verify license/advisory compliance before release
